allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\jerui\\Documents\\_JERUDEV\\Unity\\SpatialReasoningInvestigation"; $json = Get-Content "Assets\\Resources\\PythonData\\Solutions.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $found = @\(\); foreach \($key in $json.PSObject.Properties.Name\) { $solList = $json.$key; for \($si = 0; $si -lt $solList.Count; $si++\) { foreach \($p in $solList[$si].placements\) { if \($p.orientation -eq 'VERT' -and $p.is_inverted -eq $true\) { $found += [PSCustomObject]@{key=$key; sol=$si; id=$p.id; pos=$p.position; size=$p.size} } } } }; Write-Host "VERT inverted blocks found: $\($found.Count\)"; $found | Select-Object -First 10 | Format-List)
